query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN themes LIKE '%"opening"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_opening,
  SUM(CASE WHEN themes LIKE '%"middlegame"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_middlegame,
  SUM(CASE WHEN themes LIKE '%"endgame"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_endgame,
  SUM(CASE WHEN themes NOT LIKE '%"opening"%' AND themes NOT LIKE '%"middlegame"%' AND themes NOT LIKE '%"endgame"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_phase
FROM puzzles WHERE openingName IS NULL OR openingName = ''
command:

  SUM(CASE WHEN themes LIKE '%"opening"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_opening,
  SUM(CASE WHEN themes LIKE '%"middlegame"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_middlegame,
  SUM(CASE WHEN themes LIKE '%"endgame"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_endgame,
  SUM(CASE WHEN themes NOT LIKE '%"opening"%' AND themes NOT LIKE '%"middlegame"%' AND themes NOT LIKE '%"endgame"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_phase
FROM puzzles WHERE openingName IS NULL OR openingName = ''
